label: built with ArDD
logoSvg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100" role="img" aria-label="ArDD">
<!-- Source of truth for the ArDD badge mark: the badge workflow inlines this file verbatim as the endpoint JSON's logoSvg. Dark-background variant (badge label side): white ring/rect; the fourth triangle is white, matching the logo's dark-context treatment. -->
<circle cx="50" cy="50" r="34" fill="none" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="6"/>
<rect x="41" y="39" width="18" height="22" rx="3" fill="#ffffff"/>
<polygon points="10,0 -8,-9 -8,9" fill="#f26419" transform="translate(41 17) rotate(-15)"/>
<polygon points="10,0 -8,-9 -8,9" fill="#f6ae2d" transform="translate(17 41) rotate(-75)"/>
<polygon points="10,0 -8,-9 -8,9" fill="#86bbd8" transform="translate(83 59) rotate(105)"/>
<polygon points="10,0 -8,-9 -8,9" fill="#ffffff" transform="translate(59 83) rotate(165)"/>
</svg>
